name: control mapping: legal_review_status must match `pending | reviewed_by:<r>:<d> | not-applicable` per §2.9
command:
printf -- "- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule]
  legal_review_status: maybe
" > controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-controls-yaml.sh" "$PWD/controls.yaml"
